title: LTX-Video T2V & I2V (Custom)
description: Custom RunPod Serverless worker for Lightricks LTX-Video. Supports pure text-to-video AND image-to-video on any 24GB+ GPU (no Blackwell required). Uses HuggingFace diffusers directly — no ComfyUI workflow JSON needed.

config.gpuIds: ADA_24,NVIDIA RTX 4090,NVIDIA RTX A6000,NVIDIA RTX A5000,NVIDIA L40,NVIDIA L40S,NVIDIA RTX 6000 Ada Generation,-NVIDIA H100 PCIe,-NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3
